INSERT INTO languages VALUES ('Ich bleibe für ein paar Tage.');
INSERT INTO languages VALUES ('这是一个测试。');
SELECT detectLanguageUnknown(text) FROM languages WHERE text LIKE '%测试%';
CREATE TABLE language_samples (id UInt32, sample STRING);
INSERT INTO language_samples VALUES (1, 'Bonjour tout le monde.'), (2, 'Ciao come va?'), (3, '¡Hola! ¿Cómo estás?');
SELECT id, detectLanguageUnknown(sample) AS lang_code FROM language_samples;
SELECT detectLanguageUnknown(subquery.sample) FROM (SELECT sample FROM language_samples WHERE id = 1) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE multi_lang_samples (id UInt32, text STRING, context STRING);
INSERT INTO multi_lang_samples VALUES (1, 'Texto em português.', 'PT'), (2, 'Test in English.', 'EN'), (3, 'Тест на русском.', 'RU');
SELECT context, detectLanguageUnknown(text) FROM multi_lang_samples WHERE context IS NOT NULL;
SELECT detectLanguageUnknown(text) FROM (SELECT text FROM multi_lang_samples WHERE context = 'PT') AS temp;
SELECT detectLanguageUnknown(CONCAT('日本語でのテキスト', ' と ', 'すべてのテキスト'));
CREATE TABLE utf_test (id UInt32, utf16_text String);
INSERT INTO utf_test VALUES (1, 'ABCD'), (2, '全角文字');
SELECT detectLanguageUnknown(utf16_text) FROM utf_test WHERE id = 2;
